name: ua-parser-js Cryptominer & Password Stealer
description: Hijacked ua-parser-js installs XMRig Monero cryptominer on Linux and cryptominer + password-stealing trojan on Windows.

affected_packages.name: ua-parser-js
affected_packages.note: Maintainer account hijacked. Tracked as UNC3379 by Mandiant.

remediation: Check for jsextension process running and kill it
Delete jsextension, jsextension.exe, create.dll, sdd.dll files
Rotate ALL passwords - trojan steals browser and system passwords
Scan system for XMRig cryptominer processes
